summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Olivo Cards vCard application with new branding. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend displays correct Olivo branding with green olive colors. Admin PayPal configuration functional. Spanish plans and content properly implemented.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin session expires frequently requiring re-login

integration_issues.issue: Could not fully verify smooth scrolling behavior of menu links due to testing limitations

passed_tests: Olivo Cards branding and logo display
Landing page loads with correct 'sin papel' messaging
Public vCard access and view tracking
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Consider implementing longer admin session timeouts for better user experience. Menu scroll functionality appears to work but needs verification in real usage.
